calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-29-2019 Off Calendar

Notice Of Hearing For Default Prove-Up
Off Calendar Aug-08-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Marina A. Koshelev.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gail Dekreon. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Susan Crozier, CSR #4761. Telephone: 415-572-6625. Email: scrozier@sftc.org.

Josie Zimmermann, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Bank of America, N.A.
No appearance by defendant Marina A. Koshelev.
Plaintiff's complaint for Open Book/Common Counts was filed on December 18, 2018 and personally served on defendant Marina A. Koshelev on January 20, 2019.
Default as to defendant Marina A. Koshelev was entered on April 2, 2019.
No DOE defendants in plaintiff's complaint.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on August 7, 2019.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Bank of America, N.A., and against the default defendant Marina A. Koshelev, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $30,523.67.
Costs - $509.50.

Total - $31,033.17.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-06-2019 Continued To Sep-18-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
